product.description: Distributed By: Super Belgian Pte Ltd (Blk 14, Pasir Panjang Wholesale Centre, #01-26, Singapore 110014)

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Baby Cucumbers, NASAA certified organic and processed in an ISO certified facility, offer a refreshing crunch with every bite. These versatile cucumbers are ideal for adding freshness to salads, as a healthy snack, or sliced into sandwiches. Simply rinse and enjoy them as they are or incorporate them into your favorite dishes for a natural, crisp touch.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Baby Cucumbers, rinse thoroughly under cold water. Slice into rounds for salads or cut into sticks for dipping as a snack. Add to sandwiches for a refreshing crunch, or pickle for a tangy side dish. Serve chilled to enjoy their natural crispness and flavor.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the vegetables at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 3 days

product.name: ZENXIN Organic Baby Cucumber

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Japanese Cucumbers provide a crisp, mild flavor that’s perfect for salads, pickling, and refreshing snacks. Certified organic by NASAA and processed in an ISO-certified facility, they offer eco-friendly quality and freshness. With a thin, edible skin and delicate crunch, these cucumbers are ideal for slicing into salads or adding to sushi. Known for their subtle sweetness and firm texture, they make a deliciously refreshing addition to any meal.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Japanese Cucumbers, rinse thoroughly and slice as needed. Add to salads for a crisp bite, or use in sushi for a fresh, mild flavor. For a refreshing snack, cut into sticks and pair with dips, or pickle for a tangy side. Enjoy fresh to appreciate their natural crunch and subtle taste.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the vegetables at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 3 days
